name: df_silver_customers
description: Fabric Dataflow Gen2 — Silver customers cleansing. Reads bronze.customers, applies all DQ transforms, writes to silver.customers Delta table and optionally to silver._quarantine.

sources.name: BronzeCustomers
sources.description: Raw customers from Bronze Lakehouse Delta table

sinks.name: QuarantineSink
sinks.description: Rows that fail critical DQ rules go to quarantine for investigation

transformations.name: RemoveDuplicates
transformations.description: Drop exact duplicate customer_id rows, keep latest by created_at

transformations.name: ParseDateOfBirth
transformations.description: Try 6 date formats in order, return NULL if all fail

columns.date_of_birth:
coalesce(
  toDate(date_of_birth, 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
  toDate(date_of_birth, 'dd/MM/yyyy'),
  toDate(date_of_birth, 'MM-dd-yyyy'),
  toDate(date_of_birth, 'dd MMM yyyy'),
  toDate(date_of_birth, 'yyyyMMdd'),
  null()
)

transformations.name: AgeBand
transformations.description: Calculate age band from normalised date_of_birth

columns.age_band:
iif(isNull(date_of_birth), 'Unknown',
  iif(age_years between 18 and 24, '18-24',
  iif(age_years between 25 and 34, '25-34',
  iif(age_years between 35 and 44, '35-44',
  iif(age_years between 45 and 54, '45-54', '55+')))))

columns.gender_std:
case(
  upper(trim(gender)) in ('M','MALE'),      'Male',
  upper(trim(gender)) in ('F','FEMALE'),    'Female',
  upper(trim(gender)) == 'NON-BINARY',      'Non-binary',
  upper(trim(gender)) == 'PREFER NOT TO SAY', 'Prefer not to say',
  !isNull(gender),                          'Unknown',
                                            'Unknown'
)

transformations.name: CleanIncome
transformations.description: Null out negative income (data entry error), flag missing

transformations.name: DQFlags
transformations.description: Add data quality flag columns used downstream for reporting

transformations.name: SplitCleanVsQuarantine
transformations.description: Route: critical failures to quarantine, good rows to silver
